title: Llama 2 Released
description: Meta released Llama 2, an open-source large language model available for free for research and commercial use. Models ranged from 7B to 70B parameters and outperformed most open-source models on benchmarks. This marked a major shift toward open foundation models.
highlights: Free for research and commercial use

sources.title: Llama 2: Open Foundation and Fine-Tuned Chat Models
